offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate tracking of utility expenses causes cash flow gaps. We streamline expense reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and inconsistent billing data.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of utility expenses leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for utility bills
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
